testcase.name: test_01_agent_auth_valid

failure.message: AssertionError: Agent ID should be set assert None is not None + where None = <test_iteration28_organ2_organ3.TestOrgan2Organ3 object at 0xfc76d1051f50>.agent_id

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration28_organ2_organ3.py:71: in test_01_agent_auth_valid assert self.agent_id is not None, "Agent ID should be set" E AssertionError: Agent ID should be set E assert None is not None E + where None = <test_iteration28_organ2_organ3.TestOrgan2Organ3 object at 0xfc76d1051f50>.agent_id
